diagrams.title: UX Business Case Framework
diagrams.description: Shows the flow from problem identification to securing approval
diagrams.purpose: Understand the structure of a persuasive UX business case

diagrams.title: Cost of Poor UX vs Good UX
diagrams.description: Comparative impact analysis on business metrics
elements: Poor UX: High support costs, Low conversion, High churn, Negative reviews
Good UX: Low support costs, High conversion, High retention, Positive reviews
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the business impact difference between investing and not investing in UX

diagrams.title: HEART Framework Metrics
diagrams.description: Google's framework for measuring UX success
diagrams.purpose: Learn the five key metrics for quantifying UX improvements

diagrams.title: UX ROI Calculation Model
diagrams.description: Formula and components for calculating return on UX investment
elements: Benefits: Revenue increase, Cost reduction, Risk avoidance
diagrams.purpose: Understand how to financially justify UX investments to stakeholders
